summary: User Management Team Bug Fixes - All 9 backend tests pass (100%), UI verification complete. Bug fixes verified: (1) Team names show for ALL users in table (24 users with teams), (2) 3 manually-created employees (Falja, Della, Karthika) now have user accounts (total 25 users), (3) Edit User modal Team dropdown pre-populates correctly, (4) Team dropdown shows all 10 teams (active_only=false), (5) PUT /api/users/{id} accepts and persists team_id, (6) Bidirectional sync working (user team_id → employee team_id).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/users returns team_id field for all users with team assignments (24 users)
Backend: Total user count is 25 (including Falja, Della, Karthika)
Backend: Falja, Della, Karthika user accounts exist (sync-to-users worked)
Backend: GET /api/teams?active_only=false returns all 10 teams
Backend: Falja has team_id=TEAM CHALLENGER (6ee2f29d-a98e-47ce-920a-9b34b4f863ee)
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id} accepts and persists team_id correctly
Backend: Bidirectional sync works (user team_id change → employee team_id update)
Backend: Team names resolve correctly from team_id (CHALLENGER, GLADIATOR, XLNC, CLOSING MACHINE)
Backend: POST /api/hr/employees/sync-to-users endpoint returns success
Frontend: User Management table shows team names for 24 users
Frontend: TEAM CHALLENGER visible in table (7 occurrences)
Frontend: TEAM GLADIATOR visible in table (5 occurrences)
Frontend: TEAM XLNC visible in table (8 occurrences)
Frontend: TEAM CLOSING MACHINE visible in table (4 occurrences)
Frontend: Falja user found with TEAM CHALLENGER badge
Frontend: Della user found in User Management
Frontend: Karthika user found in User Management
Frontend: Edit User modal Team dropdown found and functional
Frontend: Team dropdown pre-populates with current team (TEAM CHALLENGER for Falja)
Frontend: Team dropdown lists all 10 teams including inactive ones

team_names_display.details: UsersPage.jsx lines 427-434 correctly resolve team names from teams list. Frontend fetches teams with active_only=false (line 190). Teams shown: CHALLENGER (7), GLADIATOR (5), XLNC (8), CLOSING MACHINE (4).

employee_to_user_sync.details: 3 manually-created employees (Falja, Della, Karthika) now have user accounts. POST /api/hr/employees/sync-to-users creates accounts for employees without users. Total users: 25.

edit_modal_team_dropdown.details: UsersPage.jsx lines 1070-1098 show Team dropdown in Edit modal. handleEditUser (lines 249-268) pre-populates team_id from selected user.

team_dropdown_all_teams.details: fetchTeams calls /api/teams?active_only=false (line 190). Dropdown shows all 10 teams including inactive TEAM CHALLENGER and TEAM GLADIATOR.

user_team_id_update.details: PUT /api/users/{id} endpoint (server.py line 2517) accepts team_id and persists it. Test confirmed update from CHALLENGER to GLADIATOR and back.

bidirectional_sync.details: server.py lines 2601-2603 sync team_id from user to linked employee. Test verified sync between user 49a2a0a4 and employee 49e6c71c.

critical_code_review_comments: UsersPage.jsx correctly fetches teams with active_only=false (line 190) to include inactive teams in dropdown
handleEditUser (lines 249-268) correctly includes team_id in form state for pre-population
Edit modal Team dropdown (lines 1070-1098) uses formData.team_id for value binding
server.py update_user (line 2517) correctly handles team_id in bidirectional sync (lines 2601-2603)
sync-to-users endpoint (line 11246) creates user accounts for employees without user_id
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tested with existing users and verified Falja (TEAM CHALLENGER), Della, and Karthika accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Management Team bug fixes verified. Team names now display correctly for all users (24 with teams). 3 manually-created employees (Falja, Della, Karthika) have user accounts (total 25 users). Edit User modal includes Team dropdown that pre-populates with user's current team and lists all 10 teams. PUT /api/users/{id} correctly accepts team_id and performs bidirectional sync to linked employee records. Key team IDs: CHALLENGER=6ee2f29d, GLADIATOR=abdd48bf, XLNC=34cec4f2, CLOSING MACHINE=73b4b626.
testing_method: Backend pytest (9 tests) + Playwright browser automation for UI verification with 4 screenshots
